summary: VIP Hub Briefing translation and Bitcoin wallet balance features tested and verified. Backend API /api/vip/daily-briefing correctly returns content in FR/EN/ES with language-specific caching. Frontend has all translation keys for briefing UI. Bitcoin wallet balance implementation uses Blockstream API correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: /api/vip/daily-briefing at lines 4679-4777 correctly handles lang parameter (fr/en/es), generates AI content in target language, caches per language
Frontend: hub.tsx lines 256-295 fetchWalletBalance correctly handles Bitcoin via Blockstream API, Solana via RPC, EVM via ethers.js
Frontend: hub.tsx lines 200-237 detectBlockchainType correctly identifies Bitcoin (bc1, 1, 3 prefixes), Solana, EVM addresses
Translations: All vip.briefing.* keys present in FR (lines 651-659), EN (lines 3225-3233), ES (lines 5933-5941) in translations.ts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Briefing translation feature verified: Backend API returns French/English/Spanish content correctly with per-language caching. Frontend UI labels use i18n keys. Bitcoin wallet balance uses Blockstream API. All 8 VIP Hub tabs working.

details.french: Returns content like 'Aujourd'hui, le marché des cryptomonnaies...' with cache_key '2026-03-12_fr'
details.english: Returns content like 'Today's crypto market is experiencing...' with cache_key '2026-03-12_en'
details.spanish: Returns content like 'Hoy el mercado de criptomonedas...' with cache_key '2026-03-12_es'

mocked_apis_note: The /api/news endpoint supplements live results with mock data (as noted in request)
